opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had to run to the toilet ten times since dinner, it's completely liquid, and I feel so weak and dizzy I can barely stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's relentless and I'm on my own — I'm worried about getting dehydrated overnight.

symptom_narrative.character: watery, non-bloody diarrhoea with pre-toilet lower abdominal cramps
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: weak, dizzy standing; no vomiting, no fever, no blood/black stools, no recent travel or antibiotics
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get episodic loose stools (diagnosed by biopsy)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a microscopic bowel-inflammation condition diagnosed on biopsy

access_barriers.transport: daughter can help; can call for help

objective_data_offered.value: I've still been passing a normal amount of urine, it's a normal colour
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report proxy for hydration; cannot measure postural BP remotely
